source_name: Code4rena Nudge.xyz Findings and Analysis Report (2025-03) - Low Risk and Non-Critical Issues
issue_title: Missing UUID uniqueness validation in campaign deployment
summary: NudgeCampaignFactory does not enforce uniqueness of campaign UUIDs in deployCampaign or deployAndFundCampaign. CREATE2 may still produce unique addresses because other salt inputs differ, but duplicated UUIDs can confuse off-chain tracking, analytics, or integrations that rely on UUID as a unique identifier.
root_cause: missing uniqueness tracking for externally meaningful campaign identifiers
why_not_medium_or_high: duplicated UUIDs primarily affect off-chain consistency and integration correctness; no direct on-chain exploit or asset loss is demonstrated
operational_risk: off-chain systems may merge or misattribute campaigns, producing tracking, analytics, or integration errors
recommended_mitigation: track used UUIDs in a mapping
reject campaign deployments with a previously used UUID
emit or expose canonical campaign-id mappings for off-chain systems
when_it_could_escalate: if UUIDs are used for authorization, reward attribution, or settlement outside the contract
if integrators treat UUID as a unique primary key
if campaign creation is delegated to untrusted parties
